mapper.select: SELECT id, engineer_id, task_id, start_time, end_time, schedule_type, remark, version, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted FROM engineer_schedule WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE engineer_schedule SET deleted = 1 WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted = 0
